reviews.review_title: My worst game on my meta-quest
reviews.review_description: No one playing the game that’s my only issue I think people will be playing the game is just a tad bit better ￼￼￼￼ so what I am trying to say is that you need updates that makes the game way better than it is￼

The time I played this game, I loved everything about this game but what it lacks is the updates. I am coming back to VR so please devs make updates improve everything and make it more realistic with full body tracking/hand tracking so we don't need to use controllers but our movements and our hands to play please and thank you
Devs, you guys kinda are trash do better make updates
Everyday i walk in theres no players and its just me and i will be playing in the afternoon when its popular but it not

I am having such a fantastic time playing this game. Swinging and hitting with the sword and blocking incoming hits with the shield feel great. The graphics are amazing. I plan on spending countless hours playing this game. A must own for those who love sword combat.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and for your support!

reviews.review_description: I saw this was from the same creator as Swords of Gargantua, I got really excited and decided to buy, very disappointed when I realized most of the weapon skins are from the old game which they shut down for this one..and in my opinion SoG was a better game and ran better. It's a bit buggy and doesn't look as good as I had hoped. But if you played SoG it's essentially the same game..kind of feeling cheated after buying both.

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry that the experience with the game was not satisfying for you. We recently announced that we will update the game with new content soon, so please stay tuned for more :)

reviews.review_description:
This Game is Amazing. I just hit level 20 Today and I’ve been doing great at it. The enemies that you defeat are great opponents and graphics are Decent. The problem I have with it though is the Graphics they could be Improvised a little bit. I know there isn’t much that can be wrong with the game do to the fact that it came out only 4 weeks ago and no updates yet (tell next week) but I really think the graphics could have been a little bit better such as seeing if it can be a little more realistic and I’m not asking for it to be much more realistic just a little bit. I love how when you join a room you can be paired with someone high leveled already instead of defeating some-what tough enemies with people your level or below. So other than Graphics I LOVE this game it may not have any story right now but I understand because it’s New but as long as I can Kill/Slay some enemies with Friends of with Public members I’m happy, It’s a great game and I can’t wait to see what awaits me on the Isle after the Update!- Sept 9th

With the new Update this Game has definitely improved. It has the new map and weapons and the event, It’s all great though the Map is Ginormous and It is hard to get around plus I’ve noticed that sometimes when I collect The Crystals or the chests on the new map that it Doesn’t register and so I have to go get it a second time but other than that the Game is Turning out great!- Sept 18th

developer_response.body: Thank you, we are very happy that you enjoy the new Update! I will share the feedback about the new map with the development team, appreciate it :)

reviews.review_description: Best game that I played very fun lots of excitement can't wait for the 2nd version

developer_response.body: Very happy that you are having fun, thank you for your kind words!
Very happy that you are liking it, thank you for the review!

reviews.review_description: For a VR game it's pretty neat and nice looking, wasn't hoping to get so addicted but I actually managed to spend more than 3 hours at a time with the headset on.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Don't forget to take breaks and hydrate sometimes too :)
Thank you for the short but impactful review!

reviews.review_description: One of my favorite games for VR

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review!

reviews.review_description: Recommending this game to others, has a lot of potential 😳. Any news for updates?

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, stay tuned for updates ;)

reviews.review_description:
Purchased this game after reading some of the reviews here and all I can say is that it was totally worth it.I don't regret spending money on it and I wish I could have more free time so that I can play it..

Real nice

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind review!

reviews.review_description: This game is a masterpiece and I really love it I enjoy playing  It because it has wonderful graphics  And the gameplay is basically fun and easy to understand

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we are glad that you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: Very immersive! I can't get enough of it! Such a bargain

developer_response.body: Glad you are having a good time with the game! Thank you for leaving us a review :)
Thank you very much for the review! GG to you :)
